shellCommands.command:
/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import importlib.util
mods = ['build', 'setuptools', 'wheel']
for m in mods:
    print(m, bool(importlib.util.find_spec(m)))
PY"
/bin/bash -lc 'cp dist/vectorops-0.1.0-py3-none-any.whl pypi/simple/vectorops/ && nohup python3 -m http.server 8080 --bind 127.0.0.1 --directory pypi >/tmp/vectorops-pypi.log 2>&1 & echo $!'

/bin/bash -lc "python3 -m venv .venv-test && .venv-test/bin/pip install --quiet --upgrade pip && .venv-test/bin/pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && .venv-test/bin/python - <<'PY'
from vectorops import dotproduct
print(dotproduct([1,1], [0,1]))
PY"

/bin/bash -lc "(nohup setsid python3 -m http.server 8080 --bind 127.0.0.1 --directory /home/user/workspace/pypi >/tmp/vectorops-pypi.log 2>&1 < /dev/null &) ; sleep 1; ss -ltnp '( sport = :8080 )' ; curl -I http://127.0.0.1:8080/simple/"

/bin/bash -lc ".venv-test/bin/pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && .venv-test/bin/python - <<'PY'
from vectorops import dotproduct
assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1])
print('ok')
PY"
